title: hieracium heterogynum subsp. eriopodum
intro: Hieracium heterogynum subsp. eriopodum, also known as the hawkweed or Hieracium eriopodum, is a species of flowering plant in the sunflower family (Asteraceae). This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Hieracium heterogynum subsp. eriopodum include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and alleviate digestive issues. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects and potential interactions with other medications.
